$comment: vibe flow state machine. Static source of truth for the flow. States are compound <flow>.<phase> keys. caveman and inject are FROZEN per state (byte-stable across turns; only <feature> interpolates) so the per-turn inject is prompt-cache safe. Edit this file to reshape the flow; do not template turn-varying values into any inject. set-state.sh is the only sanctioned writer of state.json.

caveman_levels.lite: No filler or hedging; full sentences. Use for strategy, setup, design, compound, amend.
caveman_levels.full: Drop articles; fragments OK; short synonyms. Working default. Use for impl, verify, quick.*.
caveman_levels.ultra: Abbreviate prose; X -> Y arrows; one word where one does. Compound receipts and subagent->orchestrator summaries only. NEVER triage.

safety_carveouts: Security warnings and irreversible-action confirmations stay in normal prose at every caveman level.
Caveman is output compression only; it never reduces reasoning depth. Code, paths, commands stay byte-exact.

idle.inject: state=idle · no active flow · pick one: vibe-setup, vibe-strategy, vibe-feature, vibe-quick · next: setup.detect | strategy.brainstorm | feature.design | quick.triage
idle.exit: user has named the work; agent has chosen a flow and called set-state.sh

setup.detect.inject: skill=vibe-setup · READ-ONLY audit of repo + harness · report what is missing/present · do NOT write yet · caveman=lite · next: setup.apply
setup.detect.exit: audit complete: missing/present harness pieces listed, plugin preflight run

setup.apply.inject: skill=vibe-setup · WRITE/MERGE bootstrap: constitution block, .agents/flow scaffold, baseline .spec/** · NEVER clobber existing content (diff + ask on divergence) · caveman=lite · next: idle
setup.apply.exit: constitution block present, .agents/flow scaffolded, lessons.md exists, never clobbered user content

strategy.brainstorm.inject: skill=vibe-strategy · delegate superpowers:brainstorming · READ .spec/lessons.md first · scratch only, no source, no spec writes yet · caveman=lite · next: strategy.spec
strategy.brainstorm.exit: direction is clear enough to write into root specs

strategy.spec.inject: skill=vibe-strategy · delegate spec · WRITE root .spec/{product,tech,design,plan}.md ONLY · no source, no lessons.md · validate after · caveman=lite · next: strategy.compound (if a durable lesson surfaced) | idle
strategy.spec.exit: root specs updated and validated; skip to idle unless a durable lesson surfaced

strategy.compound.inject: skill=vibe-compound · WRITE .spec/lessons.md (tagged entry) · regen-active-rules.sh refreshes CLAUDE/AGENTS active-rules block · receipts caveman=ultra, body=lite · next: idle
strategy.compound.exit: lesson recorded with Tags; active-rules digest regenerated

feature.design.inject: skill=vibe-feature · spec feature.md flow steps 1–4 (locate→interview WHAT→rigor gate→sketch HOW) · READ lessons.md · WRITE .spec/features/<feature>/{product,tech,design?}.md ONLY · no source · caveman=lite · next: feature.plan
feature.design.exit: feature product.md + tech.md written; design.md when full rigor; approach chosen

feature.plan.inject: skill=vibe-feature · spec feature.md step 5 (plan units) · WRITE .spec/features/<feature>/plan.md · STABLE unit IDs cite R-IDs · verification per unit · no source · caveman=lite · HUMAN GATE before impl · next: feature.impl
feature.plan.exit: plan.md has stable unit IDs; human approved moving to impl

feature.impl.inject: skill=vibe-feature · delegate executing-plans + TDD · WRITE src/**, tests/** · do NOT edit .spec/** · cite plan unit IDs (U1...) in tests/commits · caveman=full · next: feature.verify
feature.impl.exit: plan units implemented with tests that cite their unit IDs and pass

feature.verify.inject: skill=vibe-verify · delegate verification-before-completion + requesting-code-review + code-reviewer (systematic-debugging on fail) · gather EVIDENCE per plan unit ID · no spec writes · caveman=full · HUMAN GATE before ship · next: feature.compound (pass) | feature.impl (targeted fix) | feature.plan (major drift)
feature.verify.exit: evidence shows plan units satisfied; review clean; human approved shipping

feature.compound.inject: skill=vibe-compound · delegate finishing-a-development-branch · WRITE tagged .spec/lessons.md, promote cross-cutting decisions to root specs, archive .spec/features/<feature> -> .spec/archive/<feature> · regen-active-rules.sh refreshes digest · receipts caveman=ultra, body=lite · next: idle
feature.compound.exit: lesson recorded; cross-cutting decisions promoted; feature archived; digest regenerated

quick.triage.inject: skill=vibe-quick · READ .spec/lessons.md first · delegate superpowers:systematic-debugging · diagnose, do NOT fix yet · caveman=full (NOT ultra: triage must keep edge cases) · if scope balloons, escalate to feature.design · next: quick.fix
quick.triage.exit: root cause identified; fix is small and bounded (else escalate to feature)

quick.fix.inject: skill=vibe-quick · delegate TDD · WRITE src/** (+ optional .spec/quick/<slug>.md note) · no root spec writes · caveman=full · next: quick.verify
quick.fix.exit: fix implemented with a test that reproduces and resolves the issue

quick.verify.inject: skill=vibe-verify · delegate verification-before-completion + code-reviewer · gather EVIDENCE the fix works and breaks nothing · no spec writes · caveman=full · next: idle
quick.verify.exit: evidence shows fix works and regressions clear

writes: targeted .spec edits only (target state's write surface)
amend.inject: MODIFIER=amend · edit scope for the CURRENT state, then RETURN to it · carry the target state's write rules (do NOT widen them) · caveman=lite · next: <state you came from>
amend.exit: scope edit applied; returned to the originating state
